description_long: This bungalow features a rectangular layout with a prominent front porch covered by a red-tiled gable roof. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of white and brown, with the upper story clad in brown siding and the lower in a lighter color. The front yard is enclosed by a low fence, and there is a paved area leading to the entrance. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, and the roof is pitched with a traditional gable design. The backyard is fenced and includes a small patio area with outdoor furniture. A detached blue utility box or shed is positioned near the front of the property.
description: A two-story bungalow with a red-tiled gable roof, white and brown exterior, front porch, and fenced yard with patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, main entrance, symmetrical windows, and fenced yard with a blue utility box.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, the gable roof, and the fenced backyard with patio furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the blue utility box separated from the main structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the depth of the property, the backyard fence, and the patio area.
